titleStmt.title: SII 24.229: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 229. (A.R. No. 24 of 1936-37.) NORTH WALL OF THE FOURTH PRĀKĀRA.

summary.p: Registers sale of a plot of garden-land to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāmachaturvēdimaṅgalam by Śrīvaikundadāsaṉ of Tirumeyam. The record belongs to the 2nd year of Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Tribhuvanachakravartiṉ Kulaśēkharadēva. Since the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (vide No. 228 above) figure in the transactions recorded in this and the following numbers, Kulaśēkhara of this inscription who was a Māṟavarmaṉ, according to the following inscriptions must be identified with Māṟavarmaṉ Kulaśēkhara who ascended the throne in 1314 A.D., and who was therefore a junior contemporary of Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍya (accession 1302 A.D.) in whose name the above mentioned village was formed. A comparison of the details of date given in this inscription with the same details occurring in the following inscriptions will show that the expression ‘edir-ām-āṇḍu’ meaning ‘the year opposite to’ was inadvertently omitted in this inscription. Hence the details of date given in this and the following numbers (230-34) would correspond to A.D. 1316, January 13, Tuesday; ·53; f.d.n. ·93.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu Etirāmāṇṭu makaraṉāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cevvāykiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati viḷāṉāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil tiruppati śrī vaiṣṇavarkaḷil tirumeyattu śrī vaikuntadāsaṉeṉ tirunantavaṉa nila vilai pra
māṇam . perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevar tiruṉāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāma ccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṉ viṟṟukuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu tirukkuṟaip paṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāṉa tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai nāyaṉār Eṭuttakai Aḻakiya nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai maṉṟaccaviḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tātanampimāril vaṇcaṭakopadāsan tirunantavaṉattuk kuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkellai tirumuṭikkuṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiru vitikkut teṟkkum Āka naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa
Eṉṉutāna tirunantavanam mikutikkuṟai vuṭpaṭa maranilaiyum viḷainilamum Uṭpaṭa kiḻmel kol 10 6 Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟukkum maram Uṇṭākaiyil kol 1 kku U 3 100 5 Āka Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci U 5 100 6 10 Ippaṇam Aññūṟṟu Aṟupatu—āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak kaik koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaiykunta dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟil meṉok kiṉa maramuṅ kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum bhāgamum bhāgāśrayaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Ep perppaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum Uṭpaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Ippaṇam Aññūṟṟu Aṟupatukkum Ittirunantavaṉaṅ kol patiṉāṟum
vilaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcelavolai kāṭṭa vum kāṇavum kaṭavatallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟaviṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaiykunta dāsaṉeṉ Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ipramāṇappaṭi mulliyamāṉa paṇam Aññūṟṟu Aṟupatum bharatar pakkalile kaikkoḷḷukaiyāle Ituve krayadravyac celavu kaiyyiṭākak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku śrīvaiykunta dāsaṉeṉ Ittirunantavaṉam kol patiṉāṟukkum Ippaṇam Aññūṟṟu Aṟupatukkum viṟṟuk kuṭuttamaikku Ivai śrī vaikunta dāsan Eḻuttu §
Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramā
ṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ perumā
kkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paccai
vāraṇa dāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉe
ṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ceñlūr
tirukkativuṭaiyā ṉampiyeṉ §
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruccolaip
piccaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
tirumaṅkai nampiyeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
